title: Fatigue
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

red_flags.text: Defines DHA telehealth scope, Dubai purpose, licensed-provider applicability, and emergency and controlled-medication exclusions.
red_flags.rationale: Defines the exact Dubai telehealth scope and its limitations for this broader GP workflow.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Defines DHA telehealth scope, Dubai purpose, licensed-provider applicability, and emergency and controlled-medication exclusions.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Fatigue – 06

red_flags.text: Lists weight loss, bleeding, breathlessness, fever, neurological progression, malignancy features, and suicidal tendency as concern prompts.
red_flags.rationale: Directly supports the mapped weight-loss, bleeding, breathlessness, fever, neurological, and suicidality prompts as clinician-confirmed documentation only.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Lists weight loss, bleeding, breathlessness, fever, neurological progression, malignancy features, and suicidal tendency as concern prompts.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Fatigue – 06

red_flags.text: Lists emergency and face-to-face referral criteria for fatigue presentations.
red_flags.rationale: Reviewed to verify escalation criteria; no autonomous referral text was mapped.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Lists emergency and face-to-face referral criteria for fatigue presentations.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Fatigue – 06

investigations.text: Lists initial laboratory investigations for subacute or chronic fatigue and limits additional testing to the evaluated history.
investigations.rationale: Directly supports documenting the mapped blood count, thyroid, renal, and glucose investigations only when clinically ordered or reviewed.
investigations.evidence_extract: Lists initial laboratory investigations for subacute or chronic fatigue and limits additional testing to the evaluated history.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Fatigue – 06

medication.text: Defines fatigue domains, duration categories, and broad medical, psychological, medication, and substance-related associations.
medication.rationale: Directly supports fatigue terminology, duration categories, and the distinction from weakness or sleepiness.
medication.evidence_extract: Defines fatigue domains, duration categories, and broad medical, psychological, medication, and substance-related associations.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Fatigue – 06

medication.text: Specifies fatigue description, onset, course, duration, functional effect, sleep, mood, associated symptoms, medication, family, and social history.
medication.rationale: Directly supports fatigue onset, duration, functional effect, sleep, mood, and associated-symptom documentation domains.
medication.evidence_extract: Specifies fatigue description, onset, course, duration, functional effect, sleep, mood, associated symptoms, medication, family, and social history.
